subcodes.first_line: O namesake of the Lord God! That loving Friend hath manifested His glory unto the contingent world and illumined the horizons with His eternal bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سمی حضرت یزدان آن یار مهربان جلوه بامکان نمود و آفاقرا بفیض ابدی منور کرد
subcodes.subjects: @divine emanation is ceaseless; eternal, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
